writing work about now contact
About

About

Senior software engineer with 8+ years building and operating backend systems. I share how real systems behave, AI in practice, and the engineering and product judgment behind good decisions.

What I do

I build reliable services with clear contracts, strong observability, and practical tooling. My focus is production systems: how they work, how they fail, and how to debug them. Most of what I find worth writing about lives after a design leaves the whiteboard — under retries, overload, concurrency, and partial failure.

How I think about the work

Seniority shows up in anticipated consequences, not in knowing more patterns. The questions that matter are usually about what happens twice, late, partially, or during recovery — and whether a technically valid design is still operationally responsible.

The work is also not purely technical. Staying calm and structured during an incident, communicating risk before it becomes a surprise, writing documents that age well, and mentoring people earlier in the path are part of how engineering judgment becomes useful to a team. Mentorship, for me, is part of seniority: the highest-value help is usually a better question, not a handed-over answer.

Engineering areas

  • APIs & services — contracts, performance, migrations
  • Data & search — PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Elasticsearch
  • Reliability & observability — SLOs, metrics, logs, traces
  • Developer tooling — automation, developer experience, CI

Stack

Languages — Ruby, Go, Java, Python

Infrastructure & data — PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Elasticsearch, Redis, Aerospike, Kafka, Kubernetes

Observability — Prometheus, Grafana, Datadog, OpenTelemetry

Principles

  • Clarity over cleverness
  • Measure impact and make it observable
  • Design for on-call: idempotency, backpressure, timeouts
  • Prefer small, reversible steps
  • Prefer boring technology that scales
  • Prefer fast feedback loops
  • Prefer documents that age well

Recognition

  • Above and Beyond — Q1 FY 2022-2023, Snapdeal
  • Customer Champion — Q3 FY 2022-2023, Snapdeal
  • Fantabulous Award — 2020-2021, NRI Financial Technologies
  • Shining Star Award — Q2 2019-2020 & Q2 2020-2021, NRI Financial Technologies
